description: Operator-oriented overview for beta or production: service health from Vector/Loki, user traffic, frontend health, trace latency, and correlated warnings/errors.

options.content:
### FishyStuff Dashboard

Environment: **$env**

Use the health row first. Red tiles point at service errors, warning/error logs, trace errors, or host saturation. Dashboard links open env-scoped logs and Jaeger keeps traces searchable by `deployment.environment`.

Metrics, logs, and spanmetrics are filtered by `env="$env"`; beta data should not appear on production views. If prod shows zero hosts reporting logs, no prod telemetry has reached this stack in the selected window.

targets.expr: count(sum by (host, service) (count_over_time({app="fishystuff", env="$env", service=~"fishystuff-(api|dolt|edge|vector|loki|otel-collector|jaeger|prometheus|grafana)", level="error"}[30m]))) or vector(0)
count(sum by (host, service) (count_over_time({app="fishystuff", env="$env", service=~"fishystuff-(api|dolt|edge|vector|loki|otel-collector|jaeger|prometheus|grafana)"}[6h]))) or vector(0)
count((100 * (1 - avg by (host) (rate(host_cpu_seconds_total{env="$env", mode="idle"}[5m])))) > 80) or vector(0)
count((100 * sum by (host) (host_memory_used_bytes{env="$env"}) / sum by (host) (host_memory_total_bytes{env="$env"})) > 85) or vector(0)
topk(10, sum by (edge_host, edge_path) (count_over_time({app="fishystuff", env="$env", service="fishystuff-edge", service_state="access"} | json | edge_path != "" [24h])))

sum by (host, service) (count_over_time({app="fishystuff", env="$env", service=~"fishystuff-(api|dolt|edge|vector|loki|otel-collector|jaeger|prometheus|grafana)", level="error"}[30m])) or sum by (host, service) (count_over_time({app="fishystuff", env="$env", service=~"fishystuff-(api|dolt|edge|vector|loki|otel-collector|jaeger|prometheus|grafana)"}[30d])) * 0
100 * sum by (host, mountpoint) (host_filesystem_used_bytes{env="$env", filesystem!="tmpfs"}) / sum by (host, mountpoint) (host_filesystem_total_bytes{env="$env", filesystem!="tmpfs"})

title: FishyStuff Dashboard
